MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Amee A. Mikacich; Hinshaw & Culbertson LLP; 415-362-6000; appearing for defendants Veritas Investments, Inc., Greentree Property Management, Inc., Yat-Pang Au, and 845 California Street, LLC.
Ryan J. Vlasek; Bracamontes & Vlasak, P.C.; 415-835-6777; appearing for plaintiff Carol Guanzon.

Counsel for both sides contest the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Paragraph 35 of the complaint identifying prior lawsuits filed against Defendant is stricken as irrelevant matter. The motion is otherwise denied.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Amee A. Mikacich; Hinshaw & Culbertson LLP; 415-362-6000; appearing for defendants Veritas Investments, Inc., Greentree Property Management, Inc., Yat-Pang Au, and 845 California Street, LLC.
Ryan J. Vlasek; Bracamontes & Vlasak, P.C.; 415-835-6777; appearing for plaintiff Carol Guanzon.

Counsel for both sides contest the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to clarify whether she is still in current possession of the premises. The demurrer is otherwise overruled.
